type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
Reported nitrogen oxide emissions are calculated from point source stationary diesel combustion from various generators and equipment on site. Emissions are estimated using Environment Canada Diesel Fuel Generator Fuel Usage spreadsheet for the total diesel consumed in stationary equipment.  

Conuma Resources Limited continues to improve ongoing quantification, tracking and reporting of NPRI substances. Nitrogen oxide emissions from stationary sources have been quantified and reported for BC and ECCC GHG emission reporting in SWIM. Previous submissions to NPRI did not use the Environment Canada Diesel Fuel Generator Fuel Usage spreadsheet for the total diesel consumed in stationary equipment.  The total volume of reported diesel in stationary equipment was 6,741.88537 kilolitres in 2020.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment:
Review of data and reporting requirements identified substances listed in Part 1A and 1B were reportable based on the concentrations and volume of tailings produced for the reporting year. 

Annual changes in production and processing of materials will result in changes in the total volume and composition of tailings produced on site.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
A calculation error was found in spreadsheet, resulting in drilled TPM emissions to be reported in Kg oppose to tonnes. Increases in TPM from 2019 reported values is related to increased number of blasts (164) and drilled holes (35,813) in 2020 vs 133 blasts and 25,478 drilled holes in 2019. 

Reported fugitive emissions of Total Particulate Matter, PM10, and PM2.5  are cumulative emissions from stationary diesel generator combustion, unpaved road dust from mining pit and forest service road access and blasting material. 

Point source stationary diesel combustion fugitive emissions are estimated  using Environment Canada Diesel Fuel Generator. 

Road dust emissions from mining pit and forest service road access is estimated using Environment Canada Unpaved Industrial Road Dust Calculator.

Fugitive emissions from blasting are estimated using calculations from EPA AP 42, fifth Edition, Volume 1; Chapter 11: Mineral Productions Industry; Section 11.9 Western Surface Coal Mining; Table 11.9-2 Emission Factor Equations for Uncontrolled Open Dust Sources at Western Surface Coal Mines.

Reported fugitive emissions of Total Particulate Matter, PM10, and PM2.5  are cumulative emissions from stationary diesel generator combustion, unpaved road dust from mining pit and forest service road access and blasting material. 

Point source stationary diesel combustion fugitive emissions are estimated  using Environment Canada Diesel Fuel Generator.

comments.comment:
Reported fugitive emissions of Total Particulate Matter, PM10, and PM2.5 are cumulative emissions from stationary diesel generator combustion, unpaved road dust from mining pit and forest service road access and blasting material. Point source stationary diesel combustion fugitive emissions are estimated using Environment Canada Diesel Fuel Generator. Road dust emissions from mining pit and forest service road access is estimated using Environment Canada Unpaved Industrial Road Dust Calculator.
Fugitive emissions from blasting are estimated using calculations from EPA AP 42, fifth Edition, Volume 1; Chapter 11: Mineral Productions Industry; Section 11.9 Western Surface Coal Mining; Table 11.9-2 Emission Factor Equations for Uncontrolled Open Dust Sources at Western Surface Coal Mines.

Point source stationary diesel combustion fugitive emissions are estimated using Environment Canada Diesel Fuel Generator. Road dust emissions from mining pit and forest service road access is estimated using Environment Canada Unpaved Industrial Road Dust Calculator.

Fugitive emissions from blasting are estimated using calculations from EPA AP 42, fifth Edition, Volume 1; Chapter 11: Mineral Productions Industry; Section 11.9 Western Surface Coal Mining; Table 11.9-2Emission Factor Equations for Uncontrolled Open Dust Sources at Western Surface Coal Mines.

Road dust emissions from mining pit and forest service road access is estimated using Environment Canada Unpaved Industrial Road Dust Calculator.

Fugitive emissions from blasting are estimated using calculations from EPA AP 42, fifth Edition, Volume 1; Chapter 11: Mineral Productions Industry; Section 11.9 Western Surface Coal Mining; Table 11.9-2Emission Factor Equations for Uncontrolled Open Dust Sources at Western Surface Coal Mines.
